name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
#MONOGRAM COLLEGE 32cm#
It's finally here! The legendary classic original leather version from YSL is back! Still incredibly popular and timeless. A street style essential and a favorite among Hollywood stars. Looks good with any outfit, casual or formal. A bag for any occasion! 487212
Size: 32X21X8Cm
Model: 26612
